summary: Fleet GPS Map Page (Wialon replacement) - Full E2E testing complete. All features working correctly. Dark theme Leaflet map with CartoDB tiles, vehicle list with status indicators, filters, search, detail panel, add device modal, and mobile responsive view all verified.

frontend_tests.gps_page_loads: PASS - Dark theme page with Leaflet map loads correctly
frontend_tests.left_sidebar_vehicle_list: PASS - Sidebar with 3 vehicles (Mercedes, BMW, Audi)
frontend_tests.status_indicators: PASS - Green dot (moving), amber dot (stopped), grey dot (offline)
frontend_tests.filter_buttons_work: PASS - Tous/Moving/Stopped/Offline filters correctly filter vehicle list
frontend_tests.search_functionality: PASS - Search by vehicle name, driver, plate, IMEI works
frontend_tests.vehicle_card_click_opens_detail: PASS - Clicking vehicle card opens detail panel
frontend_tests.detail_panel_shows_all_info: PASS - Shows vehicle name, plate, status, driver, IMEI, position, speed, heading, satellites, ignition, last update
frontend_tests.add_device_button_opens_modal: PASS - Modal opens with IMEI, vehicle name, plate, driver fields
frontend_tests.map_markers_visible: PASS - Colored markers at correct positions
frontend_tests.map_zooms_to_selected_vehicle: PASS - Map flies to selected vehicle
frontend_tests.mobile_responsive_bottom_sheet: PASS - Mobile view shows bottom sheet instead of sidebar
frontend_tests.mobile_sidebar_hidden: PASS - Desktop sidebar hidden on mobile
frontend_tests.geolocation_nav_highlighted: PASS - Geolocalisation link highlighted in sidebar

verified_features: Fleet login and navigation to /fleet/geolocation page
GPS page renders with dark theme, Leaflet map visible with CartoDB dark tiles
Left sidebar shows vehicle list with status indicators (green=moving, amber=stopped, grey=offline)
Status filter buttons work (Tous/Moving/Stopped/Offline) and filter the vehicle list
Search bar filters vehicles by name, driver, plate, or IMEI
Clicking a vehicle card in the sidebar opens the detail panel on the right
Detail panel shows: vehicle name, license plate, status, driver, IMEI, position, speed, heading, satellites, ignition status, last update time
Close button on detail panel works
Add device button (+) opens modal with IMEI, vehicle name, license plate, driver fields
Map shows colored markers at correct positions for vehicles with GPS data
Clicking marker on map selects the vehicle
GPS backend endpoints work: GET /api/fleet/gps/positions returns vehicle data
Mobile responsive: on small screens, vehicles show as bottom sheet instead of sidebar
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper component separation (FleetMap, AddDeviceModal, VehicleDetail)
Proper use of data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Leaflet map properly initialized with cleanup on unmount
Status calculation logic correctly determines moving/stopped/offline based on speed and timestamp age
Mobile responsive design with bottom sheet for small screens
z-index properly set on detail panel (z-[1000]) to render above Leaflet layers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fleet GPS Map page fully tested and working. All Wialon code removed. GPS backend uses X-GPS-API-Key for webhooks and Bearer token for other endpoints. Frontend uses Leaflet with CartoDB dark tiles. 3 test vehicles seeded with different statuses. Mobile responsive with bottom sheet. Auto-refresh every 8 seconds.

mocked_api.note: All endpoints use real MongoDB. No mocking.
